postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get install -y inotify-tools && bash -c 'if [ -f "./install.sh" ]; then echo "Found install.sh, executing..." && bash ./install.sh && echo "install.sh completed successfully" || exit 1; else echo "No install.sh found at project root, skipping"; fi' && (grep -q 'IgnoreUnknown UseKeychain' ~/.ssh/config 2>/dev/null || sed -i '/UseKeychain/i IgnoreUnknown UseKeychain' ~/.ssh/config 2>/dev/null) && git config core.editor '/usr/bin/vim' && git config pull.rebase false && sudo curl -fsSL https://gist.githubusercontent.com/pmalacho-mit/d64caa8e16b0b0fdd5e58cc37a0ce242/raw/8f0f620d4a65f6f3d930ea14e7c2fdf382ef1bf1/codeblockify.sh -o /usr/local/bin/codeblockify && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/codeblockify && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pmalacho-mit/devcontainers/refs/heads/main/src/difftastic/install.sh | sudo install -m 0755 /dev/stdin /usr/local/bin/difftastic && git config diff.external difftastic
